## Summary

Adds a small "May take 1–2 min to load" hint in tiny gray text beneath the "Revise now" button on the evaluation report page. This sets user expectations since the workbench needs to build/load revision queues (~100 items) which can take time.

## Scope

- `app/reports/[jobId]/page.tsx` — wraps the Revise now link + hint in a flex column
- Does NOT touch the workbench page itself or any backend logic

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Purely cosmetic — no behavior change. The hint text is 10px gray and won't interfere with the button's click target.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only change to evaluation report page
